'''nanongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidosac|cnidosac]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidosac|cnidosac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nanongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nænengeth|nænengeth]] || [[word:nænengej|nænengej]] || [[word:nænengesh|nænengesh]] || [[word:nænenge|nænenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nanonongoth|nanonongoth]] || [[word:nanonongoj|nanonongoj]] || [[word:nanonongosh|nanonongosh]] || [[word:nanonongo|nanonongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nanongoth|nanongoth]] || [[word:nanongoj|nanongoj]] || [[word:nanongosh|nanongosh]] || [[word:nanongo|nanongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nanofngoth|nanofngoth]] || [[word:nanofngoj|nanofngoj]] || [[word:nanofngosh|nanofngosh]] || [[word:nanofngof|nanofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nanongotho|nanongotho]] || [[word:nanongojo|nanongojo]] || [[word:nanongosho|nanongosho]] || [[word:nanongoko|nanongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nanongoth|nanongoth]] || [[word:nanongoj|nanongoj]] || [[word:nanongosh|nanongosh]] || [[word:nanongo|nanongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nanongothol|nanongothol]] || [[word:nanongojol|nanongojol]] || [[word:nanongoshol|nanongoshol]] || [[word:nanongokol|nanongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nanongothotho|nanongothotho]] || [[word:nanongojojo|nanongojojo]] || [[word:nanongoshosho|nanongoshosho]] || [[word:nanongoko|nanongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nanongothon|nanongothon]] || [[word:nanongojon|nanongojon]] || [[word:nanongoshon|nanongoshon]] || [[word:nanongokon|nanongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nanongothoro|nanongothoro]] || [[word:nanongojoro|nanongojoro]] || [[word:nanongoshoro|nanongoshoro]] || [[word:nanongokoro|nanongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
